query: INSERT INTO promotional_banners (title, subtitle, discount_code, background_color, accent_color, is_active, sort_position) VALUES ('Sign Up & Get 10% Off Your First Order', 'Create your account and use the code below at checkout to save on your first delivery from any store.', 'WELCOME10', '#0F172A', '#00E5FF', true, 0);
